categories.title: This Week's Bake
categories.subtitle: Everything below is made by hand in small batches. WhatsApp your order before Friday evening to make sure it's saved for you.

items.name: Cappuccino Muffins
items.description:
Coffee-swirled sponge, whipped topping
Baked fresh every Saturday morning

items.name: Poppyseed Muffins
items.description:
Lemon-poppyseed crumb, soft all week
A market favourite — sells out fast

items.name: Carrot Cake Muffins
items.description:
Cream cheese icing, toasted walnut
Made with fresh farm carrots

items.name: Pies
items.description:
Chicken and mushroom pies
Plain chicken pies

items.name: Cheese Trunks
items.description:
Golden, flaky pastry
Melted cheese filling

items.name: Homemade Vetkoek
items.description:
Soft inside, golden outside
A Saturday morning must-have

items.name: Dried Fruit & Nuts
items.description:
A rotating seasonal selection
Great for snacking or gifting

categories.title: Clothing, Socks & Scarves
categories.subtitle: Alongside the baking, Khaya Kos also has a small selection of new and preloved clothing, socks and scarves — worth a browse while you wait for your order.

items.name: New & Preloved Clothing
items.description:
A changing rack of new and gently-loved finds
Sizes and stock vary week to week

items.name: Socks
items.description:
Colourful everyday pairs
Great stocking-filler stop

items.name: Scarves
items.description:
Soft, warm patterns for the cooler months
Met liefde gemaak, vir jou 💙
